ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time in seconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being trained */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the training run */,
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hardware used for training */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software used for training */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the training run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_hardware_id FOREIGN KEY ("hardware_id") REFERENCES hardware ("hardware_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Description of the model architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of parameters */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run */,
  "hidden_size" INTEGER /* Size of the hidden layer */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in training */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate for the optimizer */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Type of optimizer used */,
  "regularization" TEXT /* Type of regularization used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of performance metrics */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run */,
  "rmse_train" REAL /* RMSE for the training dataset */,
  "rmse_val" REAL /* RMSE for the validation dataset */,
  "mae_train" REAL /* MAE for the training dataset */,
  "mae_val" REAL /* MAE for the validation dataset */,
  "accuracy_train" REAL /* Accuracy for the training dataset */,
  "accuracy_val" REAL /* Accuracy for the validation dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., training, validation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data split */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "split_type" TEXT /* Type of split (e.g., random, stratified) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of data in the split */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for splitting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware" (
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of hardware */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware (e.g., GPU, CPU) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the hardware */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the hardware (e.g., in use, available) */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the hardware */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hardware_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the software (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the software (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies required by the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy value */,
  "message" TEXT /* Additional message or comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed list of changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the model */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date of deployment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the deployment (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deployment */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used for prediction */,
  "predicted_output" TEXT /* Predicted output */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Time when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES model_deployments ("deployment_id")
)
